linkedin.name: Jhan Motta
linkedin.headline: Fashion Model and Actor | Second-year Theatre and Arts Student at Brooklyn College
linkedin.about:
Since I was a kid I have been passionate about art expression and the impact that art has in the world and the changes you can create with it.

I remember the first time I saw a theatre production — I was really impressed by the acting styles, how the actor portrayed a character, the lighting work, the stage. My thoughts were: this is a big artistic environment. Now I'm pursuing this field.

Modeling has been my first experience performing and trying to express art through body language. Each runway, photoshoot, etc. — I feel so confident and proud.

---
